flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pasadena City College rose 35% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.8k → $3.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pasadena City College rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $9.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pasadena City College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($548 → $696).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pasadena City College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
